---
title: "GSE224867 — DLBCL response to doxorubicin (ADR)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
de <- read.csv("results/tables/de_limma_results.csv")
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/pca.png")
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/volcano.png")
head(de[order(de$adj.P.Val), c("gene_id","logFC","P.Value","adj.P.Val")], 20)
